hero.lead: Digital practice log specifically designed for Aikido.
titleLines: Record them instantly on the mat.
hero.textImageAlt: Silhouette of an aikido practitioner standing with a smartphone

items.alt: AikiNote screen mockup showing one-tap page creation
items.caption: Create a page with one tap

items.alt: AikiNote screen mockup highlighting preset tags
items.caption: Use preset tags to stay organized

items.alt: AikiNote screen mockup demonstrating search and filters
items.caption: Filter entries with tags or keywords

painPoints.title: Do these concerns sound familiar?

items.first: What you learn during practice <bold>doesn't come back in full detail later</bold>
items.second: Logging feels tedious, so <bold>your practice records don't last</bold>
items.third: When you want to review, <bold>you can't find the practice record you need</bold>

painPoints.imageAlt: Illustration contrasting messy notes and organized records

solutionRecording.title: Practice logging takes just three steps

steps.second: <bold>Select related tags</bold>, such as technique names
steps.third: <bold>Jot down learnings and reflections freely</bold> and save

solutionSearch.title: Find past notes in moments
solutionSearch.subtitle:
Tags, dates, keywords.
Search and sorting make reviews smooth.

first.title: Filter quickly with tags
first.body: Pick tags for standing/seated forms, technique names, and more.

second.title: Search freely with keywords
second.body: Even fuzzy memories surface the note you need.

third.title: Jump back to recent records
third.body: Perfect for a quick review before practice.

solutionSearch.imageAlt: Smartphone UI mockup showing search results

futureFeatures.title: Toward forming aikido communities across styles and borders
futureFeatures.body: You will also be able to interact with practitioners around the globe. Our community features are on the way, so stay tuned!
futureFeatures.imageAlt: Illustration of aikido practitioners worldwide connecting through devices

easeOfUse.question: Q. I am not confident with smartphones. Is it still easy?
easeOfUse.answer: A. Yes. The interface is designed for <bold>effortless operation</bold>, even if you rarely use smartphones. You can enlarge the text size whenever you need.

security.question: Q. Will my notes disappear or be seen by others?
security.answer: A. Your records stay safe in the cloud. We use secure protocols so your data remains protected from unauthorized access.

languages.question: Q. Is the service limited to Japanese users?
languages.answer: A. Not at all. The app is fully available in <bold>Japanese and English</bold> for aikido practitioners worldwide.

mobileApp.question: Q. Is there a native mobile app?
mobileApp.answer: A. A mobile app is coming soon. We will contact you via the email you registered as soon as it launches.

others.question: Q. How can I ask other questions?
others.answer: A. Please reach out through the <underlined><link>Help & Contact</link></underlined> form and we will get back to you.

fontSize.title: Font Size
fontSize.description: Please select a readable font size
fontSize.previewText: Record your Aikido practice here. Write down technique names, thoughts, and improvement points.

emailChange.title: Email Address
emailChange.description: We will send a confirmation email to your new address.
emailChange.requestSuccess: A confirmation email has been sent to your new email address. Please click the link in the email to complete the change.
emailChange.confirmSuccess: Your email address has been updated.
emailChange.confirmFailed: Failed to change your email address.
emailChange.completeNote: Please sign in again with your new email.

pageModal.title: Title
pageModal.tagNameTooLong: Tag name must be 20 characters or less

pageModal.contentTooLong: Content must be 3000 characters or less
pageModal.commentTooLong: Comment must be 1000 characters or less
pageModal.tagNameInvalid: Tag name can only contain alphanumeric characters
pageModal.closeConfirmMessage: Any unsaved changes will be lost.

attachments.videoFileTooLarge: Video file is too large (max 300MB). For longer videos, upload to YouTube and paste the URL below.
attachments.youtubeHint: For long videos, upload to YouTube and paste the URL below

navigation.fontSizeTooltip: You can change the font size in Settings

auth.loginDescription: Please login to your account to use the service
auth.passwordResetDescription: If you forgot your password, we will send a reset link to your registered email address
auth.passwordResetInstruction: We will send a password reset link to your registered email address.

auth.checkSpam: If you don't receive the email, please check your spam folder.

auth.invalidTokenMessage: Password reset token not found. Please use a valid reset link.

auth.passwordRules:
◆ 8 characters or more
◆ Include at least 3 of: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, symbols

components.validImageFile: Please select a valid image file (JPG, PNG, or WebP)

pageCreate.title: Create Page
pageCreate.contentPlaceholder: Feel free to enter what you learned and noticed through your practice!

socialPosts.description: A page where you can view and interact with posts from other users.

socialPosts.contentTooLong: Content must be 2000 characters or less

pageDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this page?

validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be 128 characters or less

surveyModal.title: Quick Survey
surveyModal.description: To provide a personalized experience, please share the following if you'd like. Everything is optional. You can change your answers anytime from the profile edit screen.
surveyModal.privacyNote: This information is used only for service improvement and personalization. You can change or delete it at any time. See our <privacyPolicyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyPolicyLink> for details.
